hero.title: Quality healthcare more affordable than you think
hero.subtitle: We help you find the best doctors and clinics in Russian regions — save up to 60% without compromising quality

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We specialize in medical fields where regional clinics offer excellent quality at affordable prices

dentistry.name: Dentistry
dentistry.shortDesc: Implants, prosthetics, and cosmetic dentistry at leading regional clinics
dentistry.description: Full range of dental services: from professional cleaning to complex implantation and prosthetics. Regional clinics are equipped with modern equipment and use the same materials as capital city centers.
advantages: Save up to 60% compared to Moscow

gynecology.name: Gynecology
gynecology.shortDesc: Diagnostics, treatment, pregnancy care and IVF at modern regional centers
gynecology.description: Comprehensive gynecological care at modern regional medical centers. Experienced specialists, advanced diagnostic equipment, and an individual approach to every patient.

phlebology.name: Phlebology
phlebology.shortDesc: Varicose vein treatment with modern minimally invasive methods
phlebology.description: Modern vein disease treatment using minimally invasive technologies. Laser coagulation, sclerotherapy, and other advanced methods for treating varicose veins without hospitalization.
advantages: Save up to 50% from capital city prices

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We believe that quality healthcare should be accessible to everyone. CureFind is a medical tourism platform that helps patients from major cities find quality and affordable treatment in Russian regions.

why.title: Why regions?
why.text: Regional clinics are often equipped with the same modern equipment as those in capital cities, and doctors are highly qualified with years of experience. At the same time, treatment costs can be 40-60% lower. We carefully select partner clinics, checking equipment quality, staff qualifications, and patient reviews.

how.title: How we work
how.text: We handle all organizational matters: selecting a doctor and clinic, preparing documents, organizing the trip, and providing support at every stage of treatment. Our goal is for you to focus on your health, not logistics.

info.workHours: Mon-Fri: 9:00 AM — 8:00 PM, Sat: 10:00 AM — 4:00 PM

footer.description: Medical tourism to Russian regions. Quality treatment at affordable prices.
